---
title: "Teams"
description: "A 30-team view combining offensive quality, run prevention, recent form, and bullpen readiness."
---

::: {.page-intro}
<span class="eyebrow">League monitor</span>

# Team pulse

A league-wide intelligence board connecting season quality, current movement, bullpen state, and each club's strongest reporting lead.
:::

{{< include includes/team-pulse.html >}}

::: {.section-action}
[Open the 30-team dossier directory](team-dossiers.qmd){.btn .btn-metallic}
:::
